svg.text: Row 1: Cursor Crop Rectangle Circle Arrow Line Freehand Number Text Pixelate · Color buttons · Text BG dropdown
Toolbar now wraps to a fixed second row (no horizontal toolbar scrolling)
Row 2: Undo · Zoom+ · Zoom- · Zoom Reset · Save · Copy
Window default/min size increased (1500x900, min 1200x700) so both rows fit in normal use
This directly addresses the request to avoid editor toolbar scrolling
• Reworked resize math to use explicit left/top/right/bottom edges anchored from the original bounds
• Applies consistent min-size constraints per-edge (instead of delta-only calculations)
• Prevents elements snapping toward (0,0) or collapsing to tiny sizes during drag/undo cycles
Validated with: dotnet build MoneyShot.sln --configuration Release -p:RestoreIgnoreFailedSources=true
